title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 16 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 16 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 16 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/06/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures held up well, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 704.5, up 0.21% for the day. Traders showed moderateenthusiasm for selling, while steel mills adopted a cautious wait-and-see aƫtude, with some conducting tenders. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
